SCRIPT.Value:
[{"seedId":"43","endNodeId":"","genericDelayJumpTime":"240","genericDelayJumpNode":"n_4","genericRedisplayTime":"120","genericRedisplayMessage":"","dataContextExpirationTime":"","engineVersion":4,"allowUsingAI":false,"importMismatches":[],"assistantId":"","consts":[{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"","SetType":"value","ReturnValue":"","ObjectType":"String"}}],"currentPersona":{"personaType":"Guided","role":"Support Agent","industry":"Retail","companyName":"My Company","tone":"Neutral","humor":"None","responseLanguage":"Automatic","length":"Balanced","emojis":"None","listType":"None","headers":false,"boldText":false,"link":false},"instructions":null},{"id":"node_0","text":"Start","parent":"#","addChannelStateMessage":false},{"id":"n_2","text":"זיהוי שפה","parent":"node_0","du":"[{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.first_message","SetType":"function","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"var first_message = {{object.message}};\nreturn first_message;"}},{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.langId","SetType":"function","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"function detectLanguage(str) {\n // Regular expression for English\n var englishRegex = /[a-zA-Z]/;\n\n // Regular expression for Hebrew\n var hebrewRegex = /[\\u0590-\\u05FF]/;\n\n // Check if the string contains characters from the Hebrew alphabet\n if (hebrewRegex.test(str)) {\n return \"he\";\n }\n // Check if the string contains characters from the Arabic alphabet\n else if (arabicRegex.test(str)) {\n return \"ar\";\n }\n // Check if the string contains characters from the Russian alphabet\n else if (russianRegex.test(str)) {\n return \"ru\";\n }\n // Check if the string contains characters from the English alphabet\n else if (englishRegex.test(str)) {\n return \"en\";\n }\n // If neither, return \"und\" for undefined language\n else {\n return \"he\";\n }\n}\n\nreturn detectLanguage({{object.message}});"}}]","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"attachments":{}},{"id":"n_3","text":"עברית","parent":"n_2","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var langId = {{data.langId}};\nif (langId == \"he\"){\n return true;\n}\nreturn false;"}","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"attachments":{}},{"id":"n_5","text":"הודעת פתיחה","parent":"n_3","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"bodyHtml":"

ברוכים הבאים לשירות הדיגיטלי החדש של חברת אייר 🛫

","attachments":{}},{"id":"n_6","text":"זיהוי אינטנט","parent":"n_5","du":"[{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.intent","SetType":"function","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"var intent = JSON.parse({{data.openai}}.choices[0].message.content);\nvar intent = intent.intent;\nreturn intent;"}}]","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"sc":"{"type":"REST","url":"https://tiff-sweden.openai.azure.com/openai/deployments/gpt-4o/chat/completions?api-version=2024-08-01-preview","body":{"response_format":{"type":"json_object"},"messages":[{"role":"system","content":"I will provide you with a sentence from a client addressing an airline's customer service. Your task is to identify the intent of the sentence based on a predefined list of intents. Your response must be returned strictly in the following JSON format: {intent: your response} and should contain only one intent. The available intents are: change outbound flight, change return flight, change my flight, select meals, book a flight using loyalty points, check my loyalty points balance, cancel due to emergency, change hotel , retrieve my loyalty number, traveling with children, traveling with a baby, traveling with pets, traveling while pregnant, check-in issue, how to check-in, airport assistance request, group travel, available destinations, join the loyalty program, unaccompanied minor travel, receive my reservation, visa information, flight cancellation, in-flight WiFi, cancel my reservation, lost baggage, forgot something at the airport, add baggage, additional baggage booking, questions about baggage allowance, cancellation due to emergency, vacation cancellation, cancellation request due to hotel issues, change name on reservation, change destination, change hotel in package, change booking dates, hotel complaints, website booking issues, request booking documents, hotel room issues, booking confirmation, booking not confirmed/cancelled, refund status, refund request due to a change made, refund request due to better price, refund request due to hotel issues, refund request due to vacation problems, request an invoice, questions about transfers, seat selection on flight, upgrade hosting package, questions about flight check-in, greetings, other."},{"role":"user","content":"{{data.first_message}}"}]},"contentType":"application/json;charset=utf-8;","debug":false,"exports":{"headers":"headers_n_6","ns":"openai"},"headers":{"api-key":"e7ecf7761dab4d2d91d3dd2fc55a632f"},"httpMethod":"POST","wasConvertedToForm":true}","bodyHtml":""},{"id":"n_11","text":"הצגת אינטנט","parent":"n_6","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var intent = {{data.intent}}\nif(intent ==\"retrieve my loyalty number\" ||intent ==\"select meals\"||intent ==\"change hotel\" ||intent ==\"book a flight using loyalty points\" ||intent ==\"check my loyalty points balance\" || intent == \"booking confirmation\" || intent == \"questions about baggage allowance\" || intent == \"booking not confirmed/cancelled\" || intent == \"booking not confirmed/cancelled\" || intent == \"website booking issues\" || intent ==\"cancel due to emergency\"){\n return false;\n}\nreturn true;"}","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"bodyHtml":"

זיהיתי שאתה פונה בנושא {{data.intent}}


לידיעתך, אני יודע לתת מענה בנושאים רבים כגון מידע על הזמנת כרטיס באמצעות נקודות, בחירת ארוחה, שחזור מספר חבר או מידע על נקודות חבר מועדון

","end":"2"},{"id":"n_12","text":"בחירת ארוחה","parent":"n_6","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var intent = {{data.intent}}\nif(intent ==\"select meals\"){\n return true;\n}\nreturn false;"}","du":"[{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.system_message","SetType":"function","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"var system_message = \"Your task is to assist El Al customers in selecting meals for their flight, ensuring that each passenger receives one of the following options: vegan, kosher, vegetarian, or fruit. The client has contacted customer service to specify meal preferences for the passengers, whose current selections are: David Cohen - Kosher, Yael Cohen - Vegan, and Noam Cohen - Kosher. If the client has not provided enough details, leave the 'meal' field unchanged and continue asking polite, clear, and efficient follow-up questions, explaining why the information is needed while considering the conversation history. Ask multiple questions at once to gather details efficiently, and in your question, always summarize the meal selections for all passengers, using their names in English, before requesting any missing information. Respond in JSON format with three fields: 'passengers' (a list of objects, each containing 'first_name', 'last_name', and 'meal'), 'question' (a string summarizing the current meal selections with names in English and asking follow-up questions if additional details are required), and 'confirmed' (a boolean set to true once the client confirms that meal selections are final, and false otherwise). Always respond exclusively in Hebrew,except for passengers names, using a polite and casual tone, ensuring that questions are short and clear, and pay attention to gender when addressing the customer—using the appropriate masculine or feminine form when known and defaulting to masculine if uncertain.\";\nvar customerQuestion = {{data.first_message}};\n\nsystem_message = system_message + \"User: \" + customerQuestion + \" ,\";\n\nreturn system_message;"}}]","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"attachments":{}},{"id":"n_16","text":"conversational ai","parent":"n_12","du":"[{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.question","SetType":"function","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"var json = JSON.parse({{data.conversational}}.choices[0].message.content);\nvar question = json.question;\nreturn question;"}},{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.confirmed","SetType":"function","ObjectType":"bool","ReturnValue":"var json = JSON.parse({{data.conversational}}.choices[0].message.content);\nvar confirmed = json.confirmed;\nreturn confirmed;"}}]","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"sc":"{"debug":false,"wasConvertedToForm":true,"type":"rest","url":"https://tiff-sweden.openai.azure.com/openai/deployments/gpt-4o/chat/completions?api-version=2024-08-01-preview","contentType":"application/json; charset=utf-8;","httpMethod":"POST","headers":{"api-key":"e7ecf7761dab4d2d91d3dd2fc55a632f"},"body":{"response_format":{"type":"json_object"},"messages":[{"role":"system","content":"{{data.system_message}}"},{"role":"user","content":"{{data.first_message}}"}]},"exports":{"ns":"conversational","headers":"headers_n_16"}}"},{"id":"n_17","text":"Next question","parent":"n_16","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var confirmed = {{data.confirmed}};\nif (confirmed){\n return false;\n}\nreturn true;"}","du":"[{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.system_message","SetType":"function","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"var system_message = {{data.system_message}};\nvar question = {{data.question}};\nvar customerQuestion = {{data.first_message}};\n\nsystem_message = system_message + \"Assistant : \" + question + \" , User: \" + customerQuestion + \" ,\";\n\nreturn system_message;"}}]","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"bodyHtml":"{{data.question}}","d_e":[{"uniqueName":"first_message","name":"ניתן לענות בטקסט חופשי","labelDescription":"","type":"string","key":false,"isVisible":false,"isMandatory":true,"askOnlyOnce":false,"isSystemField":false,"fieldType":"1","validation":""}]},{"id":"n_18","text":"to conversational","parent":"n_17","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"step":"n_16,lLXFP17rO_fCOKYOXGpw5Xg%3d%3d"},{"id":"n_19","text":"end","parent":"n_16","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var confirmed = {{data.confirmed}};\nif (confirmed){\n return true;\n}\nreturn false;"}","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"bodyHtml":"הארוחות עודכנו
תודה שפנית אלינו!","end":"2"},{"id":"n_13","text":"הזמנת טיסה עם נקודות","parent":"n_6","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var intent = {{data.intent}}\nif(intent ==\"book a flight using loyalty points\"){\n return true;\n}\nreturn false;"}","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"bodyHtml":"

איך מזמינים כרטיס טיסה עם נקודות באתר?

  1. מזדהים באתר כחברי מועדון
  2. נכנסים למנוע ההזמנות של הטיסה המבוקשת ומזינים יעד, תאריכים ומספר נוסעים.
  3. מוצאים טיסה ומסמנים "הצג מחיר בנקודות וכרטיסי בונוס".
  4. בוחרים את סוג הכרטיס ובודקים מה גובה ההנחה בתמורה לכמות הנקודות שבחרת לממש (הסרגל מופיע בתחתית העמוד)

- מימוש נקודות בהזמנת כבודה והושבה נעשה באותו אופן.​

","attachments":{}},{"id":"n_25","text":"תודה שפנית אלינו","parent":"n_13","delayEntranceTime":"3","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"bodyHtml":"תודה שפנית אלינו 😊","end":"2"},{"id":"n_14","text":"כמה נקודות יש לי","parent":"n_6","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var intent = {{data.intent}}\nif(intent ==\"check my loyalty points balance\"){\n return true;\n}\nreturn false;"}","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"bodyHtml":"

לקוח יקר, ניתן לראות את יתרת הנקודות שלך באזור האישי.

","attachments":{}},{"id":"n_20","text":"משהו נוסף?","parent":"n_14","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"d_e":[{"uniqueName":"question","name":"משהו נוסף שאוכל לסייע?","labelDescription":"","type":"string","key":false,"isVisible":false,"isMandatory":true,"askOnlyOnce":false,"isSystemField":false,"fieldType":"1","validation":""}],"delayJumpTime":"180","delayJumpStep":"n_11"},{"id":"n_26","text":"בדיקת תשובה","parent":"n_20","du":"[{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.intent","SetType":"function","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"var intent = JSON.parse({{data.responseopen}}.choices[0].message.content);\nvar intent = intent.intent;\nreturn intent;"}}]","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"sc":"{"debug":false,"wasConvertedToForm":true,"type":"rest","url":"https://tiff-sweden.openai.azure.com/openai/deployments/gpt-4o/chat/completions?api-version=2024-08-01-preview","contentType":"application/json; charset=utf-8;","httpMethod":"POST","headers":{"api-key":"e7ecf7761dab4d2d91d3dd2fc55a632f"},"body":{"response_format":{"type":"json_object"},"messages":[{"role":"system","content":"I will provide you with a sentence from a client responding to an airline's customer service after being asked, Can I help you? This question follows the client receiving information about their loyalty points. Your task is to identify the intent of the sentence based on a predefined list of intents. Your response must be strictly formatted as JSON: { intent: your response }, containing only one intent. The available intents are: yes, no, speak with an agent, possible destinations, and other."},{"role":"user","content":"{{data.question}}"}]},"exports":{"ns":"responseopen","headers":"headers_n_26"}}"},{"id":"n_27","text":"כן","parent":"n_26","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var intent = {{data.intent}}\nif(intent ==\"yes\"){\n return true;\n}\nreturn false;"}","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"step":"n_20,lLXFP17rO_fCOKYOXGpw5Xg%3d%3d"},{"id":"n_28","text":"לדבר עם נציג","parent":"n_26","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var intent = {{data.intent}}\nif(intent ==\"speak with an agent\"){\n return true;\n}\nreturn false;"}","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"bodyHtml":"אני מייד מעביר אותך לנציג שירות","end":"2"},{"id":"n_29","text":"יעדים אפשריים","parent":"n_26","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var intent = {{data.intent}}\nif(intent ==\"possible destinations\"){\n return true;\n}\nreturn false;"}","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"bodyHtml":"

רוצים לראות לאן תוכלו לטוס עם הנקודות שצברתם?

חברי מועדון ומחזיקי כרטיס האשראי ריכזנו עבורכם מגוון יעדים לחופשת חורף מפנקת, אליהם תוכלו לרכוש כרטיס בונוס בנקודות

www.yourwebsite.com

","end":"2"},{"id":"n_30","text":"לא","parent":"n_26","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var intent = {{data.intent}}\nif(intent ==\"no\"){\n return true;\n}\nreturn false;"}","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"bodyHtml":"שמחתי לעמוד לשירותך 😊","end":"2"},{"id":"n_15","text":"שחזור מספר חבר","parent":"n_6","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var intent = {{data.intent}}\nif(intent ==\"retrieve my loyalty number\"){\n return true;\n}\nreturn false;"}","du":"[{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"system_message","SetType":"function","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"var system_message = \"Your task is to assist El Al customers in retrieving their loyalty number by collecting the following information: first name (in English, as it appears on the passport), last name (in English, as it appears on the passport), TZ number (9 digits), and email. If the client provides their name in Hebrew, do not fill in the 'first_name' and 'last_name' fields and politely ask them to provide the names in English exactly as they appear on the passport. Record the names exactly as the user writes them without any translation or modification. If the client has not provided enough details, leave the relevant fields unchanged and continue asking polite, clear, and efficient follow-up questions, explaining why the information is needed while considering the conversation history. Ask multiple questions at once to gather details efficiently and always summarize the provided information before requesting any missing details. Respond in JSON format with the following fields: 'first_name' (string), 'last_name' (string), 'tz' (string, 9 digits), 'email' (string), and 'question' (a string summarizing the current information and asking follow-up questions if additional details are required). Always respond exclusively in Hebrew, except for names, using a polite and casual tone, ensuring that questions are short and clear while paying attention to gender when addressing the customer—using the appropriate masculine or feminine form when known and defaulting to masculine if uncertain.\";\nvar customerQuestion = {{data.first_message}};\n\nsystem_message = system_message + \"User: \" + customerQuestion + \" ,\";\n\nreturn system_message;"}}]","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"attachments":{}},{"id":"n_21","text":"conversational ai","parent":"n_15","du":"[{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.question","SetType":"function","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"var json = JSON.parse({{data.conversational}}.choices[0].message.content);\nvar question = json.question;\nreturn question;"}},{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.first_name","SetType":"function","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"var json = JSON.parse({{data.conversational}}.choices[0].message.content);\nvar first_name = json.first_name;\nreturn first_name;"}},{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.last_name","SetType":"function","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"var json = JSON.parse({{data.conversational}}.choices[0].message.content);\nvar last_name = json.last_name;\nreturn last_name;"}},{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.tz","SetType":"function","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"var json = JSON.parse({{data.conversational}}.choices[0].message.content);\nvar tz = json.tz;\nreturn tz;"}},{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.email","SetType":"function","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"var json = JSON.parse({{data.conversational}}.choices[0].message.content);\nvar email = json.email;\nreturn email;"}}]","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"sc":"{"debug":false,"wasConvertedToForm":true,"type":"rest","url":"https://tiff-sweden.openai.azure.com/openai/deployments/gpt-4o/chat/completions?api-version=2024-08-01-preview","contentType":"application/json; charset=utf-8;","httpMethod":"POST","headers":{"api-key":"e7ecf7761dab4d2d91d3dd2fc55a632f"},"body":{"response_format":{"type":"json_object"},"messages":[{"role":"system","content":"{{data.system_message}}"},{"role":"user","content":"{{data.first_message}}"}]},"exports":{"ns":"conversational","headers":"headers_n_16"}}"},{"id":"n_22","text":"Next question","parent":"n_21","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var first_name = {{data.first_name}};\nvar last_name = {{data.last_name}};\nvar tz = {{data.tz}};\nvar email = {{data.email}};\n\nif (first_name ==\"\" || last_name ==\"\" || tz ==\"\" ||email ==\"\"){\n return true;\n}\nreturn false;"}","du":"[{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.system_message","SetType":"function","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"var system_message = {{data.system_message}};\nvar question = {{data.question}};\nvar customerQuestion = {{data.first_message}};\n\nsystem_message = system_message + \"Assistant : \" + question + \" , User: \" + customerQuestion + \" ,\" + \" Assistant: Don't forget the user has to give you his name in English only, \";\n\nreturn system_message;"}}]","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"bodyHtml":"{{data.question}}","d_e":[{"uniqueName":"first_message","name":"ניתן לענות בטקסט חופשי","labelDescription":"","type":"string","key":false,"isVisible":false,"isMandatory":true,"askOnlyOnce":false,"isSystemField":false,"fieldType":"1","validation":""}]},{"id":"n_23","text":"to conversational","parent":"n_22","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"step":"n_21,lLXFP17rO_fCOKYOXGpw5Xg%3d%3d"},{"id":"n_24","text":"end","parent":"n_21","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var first_name = {{data.first_name}};\nvar last_name = {{data.last_name}};\nvar tz = {{data.tz}};\nvar email = {{data.email}};\n\nif (first_name ==\"\" || last_name ==\"\" || tz ==\"\" ||email ==\"\"){\n return false;\n}\nreturn true;"}","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"bodyHtml":"

מספר חבר שלך הינו 36719073
תודה שפנית אלינו

","end":"2"},{"id":"n_31","stream":{},"bodyHtml":"

היי אני דואג שנציג מחלקת הזמנות שלך יחזור אלייך בשעה הקרובה האם תהיה זמין ?

","text":"השלמת הזמנה","parent":"n_6","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var intent = {{data.intent}}\nif(intent ==\"booking not confirmed/cancelled\" || intent == \"website booking issues\"){\n return true;\n}\nreturn false;"}"},{"id":"n_32","stream":{},"bodyHtml":"

מעולה, אני מעביר את הפנייה לנציג שירות. תודב שפנית אלינו

","text":"כן","parent":"n_31","end":"2"},{"id":"n_33","end":"2","text":"לא","parent":"n_31","bodyHtml":"

אין בעיה, אני מזמין אותך לחזור אלינו ברגע שתתפנה. נשמח לתת לך שירות


"},{"id":"n_34","stream":{},"bodyHtml":"
לקוח יקר , להלן המקרא של הכבודה לפי אנא בדוק את זה לפי מה שרשום בכרטיס שלך :
ללא כבודת יד - מאפשר תיק גב בגודל 38x30x18 cm ללא טרולי 
כבודת יד מאפשר טרולי או תיק בגודל 56x45x25 cm 
כבודת שליחה - מאפשר בדרך כלל מזוודה בגודל 158 cm עד משקל 23 kg. יש לשים לב להגבלת משקל שרשומה בכרטיס שלך. 
לידיעתך ממליצים לבדוק את האתר של חברת התעופה ולהקיש את מספר ההזמנה שלך שם תוכל לבדוק אפשרות להזמנת כבודה נוספת באופן ישיר


","text":"כמה כבודה","parent":"n_6","end":"2","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var intent = {{data.intent}}\nif(intent ==\"questions about baggage allowance\"){\n return true;\n}\nreturn false;"}"},{"id":"n_35","stream":{},"bodyHtml":"

לקוח יקר במידה וההזמנה לא אושרה מידית בביצוע ההזמנה ה זמן לאישור ההזמנה הינו 24 שעות זמן זה נדרש לקבלת אישורים מהמלונות ו/או ספקים אחרים בהזמנתכם ועד לתום הזמן תקבל מאיתנו sms ואישור / ביטול לכתובת המייל 

","text":"לא קיבלתי אישור על ההזמנה שלי","parent":"n_6","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var intent = {{data.intent}}\nif(intent == \"booking confirmation\"){\n return true;\n}\nreturn false;"}"},{"id":"n_36","d_e":[{"uniqueName":"hours","name":"במידה והזמנת לפני 24 שעות עסקים אנא הקש 1","labelDescription":"","type":"string","key":false,"isVisible":false,"isMandatory":true,"askOnlyOnce":false,"fieldType":"1","isSystemField":false,"validation":""}],"text":"יותר מ24 שעות","parent":"n_35"},{"id":"n_41","stream":{},"bodyHtml":"","text":"הגדרת משתנים","parent":"n_36","du":"[{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.system_message","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"var system_message = \"Your task is to assist airline customers who have not received their flight confirmation. Always respond exclusively in Hebrew, using a polite and casual tone, keeping questions short and clear, and adjusting gender appropriately (default to masculine if unknown). First, ask for the customer's email; if they say they don't have it, request the email address of one of the passengers. Then, ask if the reservation is linked to the phone number from which they are contacting; if yes, write 'true', if not, politely ask for their phone number. Also, ask for the flight's departure date. Respond in JSON format with four fields: 'email' (string containing the customer's or a passenger's email, or empty if missing), 'phone_confirmed' (true if the phone matches, otherwise the provided phone number, or empty if missing), 'departure_date' (string with the flight's departure date, or empty if missing),'question' (a string summarizing the current information and asking follow-up questions if additional details are required) and 'confirmed' (boolean set to true only after the client has validated that all provided information is correct and complete, otherwise false). After asking all questions, always summarize clearly the collected information (email, phone confirmation, and departure date) before asking for confirmation. If any field is missing, explain politely what is still needed. Ask multiple questions together when possible to be efficient.\";\nvar customerQuestion = {{data.first_message}};\n\nsystem_message = system_message + \"User: \" + customerQuestion + \" ,\";\n\nreturn system_message;","SetType":"function"}}]"},{"id":"n_37","text":"conversational ai","parent":"n_41","du":"[{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.question","SetType":"function","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"var json = JSON.parse({{data.conversational}}.choices[0].message.content);\nvar question = json.question;\nreturn question;"}},{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.confirmed","SetType":"function","ObjectType":"bool","ReturnValue":"var json = JSON.parse({{data.conversational}}.choices[0].message.content);\nvar confirmed = json.confirmed;\nreturn confirmed;"}},{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.email","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"var json = JSON.parse({{data.conversational}}.choices[0].message.content);\nvar email = json.email;\nreturn email;","SetType":"function"}},{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.phone_confirmed","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"var json = JSON.parse({{data.conversational}}.choices[0].message.content);\nvar phone_confirmed = json.phone_confirmed;\nreturn phone_confirmed;","SetType":"function"}},{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.departure_date","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"var json = JSON.parse({{data.conversational}}.choices[0].message.content);\nvar departure_date = json.departure_date;\nreturn departure_date;","SetType":"function"}}]","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"sc":"{"debug":false,"wasConvertedToForm":true,"type":"rest","url":"https://tiff-sweden.openai.azure.com/openai/deployments/gpt-4o/chat/completions?api-version=2024-08-01-preview","contentType":"application/json; charset=utf-8;","httpMethod":"POST","headers":{"api-key":"e7ecf7761dab4d2d91d3dd2fc55a632f"},"body":{"response_format":{"type":"json_object"},"messages":[{"role":"system","content":"{{data.system_message}}"},{"role":"user","content":"{{data.first_message}}"}]},"exports":{"ns":"conversational","headers":"headers_n_16"}}"},{"id":"n_38","text":"Next question","parent":"n_37","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var confirmed = {{data.confirmed}};\nif (confirmed){\n return false;\n}\nreturn true;"}","du":"[{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.system_message","SetType":"function","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"var system_message = {{data.system_message}};\nvar question = {{data.question}};\nvar customerQuestion = {{data.first_message}};\n\nsystem_message = system_message + \"Assistant : \" + question + \" , User: \" + customerQuestion + \" ,\";\n\nreturn system_message;"}}]","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"bodyHtml":"

{{data.question}}

","d_e":[{"uniqueName":"first_message","name":"ניתן לענות בטקסט חופשי","labelDescription":"","type":"string","key":false,"isVisible":false,"isMandatory":true,"askOnlyOnce":false,"isSystemField":false,"fieldType":"1","validation":""}]},{"id":"n_39","text":"to conversational","parent":"n_38","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"step":"n_37,lLXFP17rO_fCOKYOXGpw5Xg%3d%3d"},{"id":"n_40","text":"end","parent":"n_37","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var confirmed = {{data.confirmed}};\nif (confirmed){\n return true;\n}\nreturn false;"}","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"bodyHtml":"

תודה הפרטים הועברו לנציג שיתכתב איתך בעוד מספר רגעים.

","end":"2"},{"id":"n_43","stream":{},"bodyHtml":"

שינוי מלון 

","text":"שינוי מלון ","parent":"n_6","end":"2","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var intent = {{data.intent}}\nif(intent ==\"change hotel\"){\n return true;\n}\nreturn false;"}"},{"id":"n_42","stream":{},"bodyHtml":"
ביטול חירום 
","text":"ביטול חירום ","parent":"n_6","end":"2","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var intent = {{data.intent}}\nif(intent ==\"cancel due to emergency\"){\n return true;\n}\nreturn false;"}"},{"id":"n_4","text":"אנגלית","parent":"n_2","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var langId = {{data.langId}};\nif (langId == \"he\"){\n return false;\n}\nreturn true;"}","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"bodyHtml":"

Hey! I see that you contacted us in English.  


Currently, our service is available in Hebrew.  



For your information, I can assist you with various topics such as booking a ticket using points, meal selection, retrieving a membership number, or checking your loyalty points.  



Feel free to ask in Hebrew, and I’ll be happy to help! 😊

","end":"2"}]
SCRIPT.Name: Airline 4/18/2026 4:08:52 PM
